name: Blaze Fenix, the Burning Bombardment Bird
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>重</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>爆</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>撃禽</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げきん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ボム・フェネクス
name_jp_tl: Bomb Fenix, the Heavy Bombardment Bird
desc:
1 Machine-Type monster + 1 Pyro-Type monster
Once per turn, during your Main Phase: You can inflict 300 damage to your opponent for each card on the field. This card cannot attack during the turn you activate this effect.
